author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Sonic Frontiers: Definitive Edition apparently spotted at retail for Nintendo Switch 2

Just when we thought that we had run out of ways for Sonic Frontiers: Definitive Edition to be leaked on Nintendo Switch 2, another one comes our way. The latest leak comes from Reddit user conis-4, who apparently works at Walmart. This person claims that Sonic Frontiers: Definitive Edition came in today along with other Nintendo products. conis-4 shared a...

The post Sonic Frontiers: Definitive Edition apparently spotted at retail for Nintendo Switch 2 appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Super Farming Boy launch trailer – action-puzzle farming sim lands on Nintendo Switch

LemonChili Soft put Super Farming Boy on Nintendo Switch this past week, and to celebrate, the official launch trailer has come in. The new title offers action-puzzle farming sim featuring chain reactions and combos. A ton of details can be found in the following description: Super Farming Boy is an exciting mix of ACTION, PUZZLE, and FARMING SIM, heavily relying...

The post Super Farming Boy launch trailer – action-puzzle farming sim lands on Nintendo Switch appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Trivia Murder Party 3 announced for Nintendo Switch

Jackbox Games will release Trivia Murder Party 3 on Nintendo Switch, the company has announced. The title will be ready to go in 2027. Trivia Murder Party 3 is a multiplayer trivia game. This first started out in The Jackbox Party Pack 3, with a sequel following in The Jackbox Party Pack 6. Now the third game is getting its...

The post Trivia Murder Party 3 announced for Nintendo Switch appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Xbox reportedly shutting down South of Midnight dev Compulsion Games

According to a report from Kotaku, Xbox will be shutting down Compulsion Games. An official announcement has not been made, but that could be changing very soon. Compulsion Games previously made South of Midnight, which came to Nintendo Switch 2 a little while back. The studio was also behind We Happy Few. Kotaku believes that more than 90 people will...

The post Xbox reportedly shutting down South of Midnight dev Compulsion Games appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Assassin’s Creed Shadows 1.1.11 update announced, patch notes – new story quest, Nintendo Switch 2 handheld GPU improvements, more

Assassin’s Creed Shadows has just announced its latest update, version 1.1.11, which is coming to Nintendo Switch 2 and other platforms. It will be out tomorrow, June 16. This is the last content drop for the game. Ubisoft is adding in a new free story quest, a new Animus activity, and more. Elsewhere. there are things like Nintendo Switch 2...

The post Assassin’s Creed Shadows 1.1.11 update announced, patch notes – new story quest, Nintendo Switch 2 handheld GPU improvements, more appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
UK software sales chart for the week ending June 13, 2026 – Pokemon Pokopia back in the top five

The latest UK software sales chart for the week ending June 13, 2026 is now available. Driven by the World Cup, EA Sports FC 26 has risen significantly to take the top spot. In terms of Nintendo exclusives though, Pokemon Pokopia leads and is now back in the top five. Here’s the full UK software sales chart for the week...

The post UK software sales chart for the week ending June 13, 2026 – Pokemon Pokopia back in the top five appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Rumor: Nintendo hit with data breach, hacker steals 859MB of data via TINYpulse

Nintendo may have suffered a new breach in which TINYpulse systems have been targeted. A hacker with the handle SHADOWBYT3$ allegedly obtained about 859MB of data. The claim was made on June 13, 2026, but has not been properly verified. Employee information seems to be the most affected at present. Currently the following data is said to be impacted: employee...

The post Rumor: Nintendo hit with data breach, hacker steals 859MB of data via TINYpulse appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Point-and-click adventure game Scholar Adventure: Mystery of Silence hitting Nintendo Switch in July

DevilishGames and Making Enemies are bringing over Scholar Adventure: Mystery of Silence to Nintendo Switch, they’ve announced. It’s coming up very soon as the release date is set for July 3, 2026. Scholar Adventure: Mystery of Silence is a point-and-click adventure game inspired by similar titles from the 90s. You’ll play as a young writer who is searching for inspiration...

The post Point-and-click adventure game Scholar Adventure: Mystery of Silence hitting Nintendo Switch in July appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Mega Man Star Force Legacy Collection update out now, patch notes

Today, Capcom issued a new update for Mega Man Star Force Legacy Collection. You can download it now on Nintendo Switch and elsewhere. The main highlight is that Mega Man Star Force Legacy Collection now has functionality to swap the confirm and cancel buttons in the controller settings menu. On top of that though, a bunch of different fixes have...

The post Mega Man Star Force Legacy Collection update out now, patch notes appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Catto’s Post Office, a short cozy delivery adventure game, heading to Nintendo Switch

In Shambles Studio announced the upcoming launch of Catto’s Post Office today, which is happening later this month. Expect to see the title on June 25, 2026. Catto’s Post Office is a cozy delivery adventure game. Despite it being about an hour long, it has a very strong reception on PC. Here’s an overview of the game with more information:...

The post Catto’s Post Office, a short cozy delivery adventure game, heading to Nintendo Switch appeared first on Nintendo Everything.
